ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aluminium_compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the aluminium compound */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the compound in g/cm³ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the plant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity in tons per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement period */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of measurement in days */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement period (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the production process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "input_compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the input aluminium compound */,
  "output_compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the output aluminium compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aluminium compound measured */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where measurement occurred */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement duration period */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process during which measurement occurred */,
  "mean_insoluble" REAL /* Mean insoluble aluminium level observed */,
  "mean_soluble" REAL /* Mean soluble aluminium level observed */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who performed the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES aluminium_compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES measurement_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., quality control) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the analyst (e.g., quality assurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QA check */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being checked */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the QA check */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the QA procedure */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date of the QA check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assurance_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "max_soluble" REAL /* Maximum allowable soluble aluminium level */,
  "max_insoluble" REAL /* Maximum allowable insoluble aluminium level */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the QA check */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicator of compliance status (true/false) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks on compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES environmental_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_qa_id FOREIGN KEY ("qa_id") REFERENCES quality_assurance ("qa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement data */,
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance record */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., measurement, compliance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_compliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_id") REFERENCES compliance_records ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_improvements" (
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process improvement */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process being improved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the improvement made */,
  "date_implemented" TEXT /* Date when the improvement was implemented */,
  "implemented_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who implemented the improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_improvements_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the training */,
  "facilitator" TEXT /* Name of the facilitator */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_facilitator FOREIGN KEY ("facilitator") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where the equipment is located */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of equipment installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_equipment_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES plant_equipment ("equipment_id")
)
